items.definition_en: A call is when you talk to someone on the phone.
items.example_en: I got a call from my friend last night.

items.definition_en: A chat is a short, informal conversation online or in person.
items.example_en: We had a chat online after school.

items.definition_en: A comment is a message people write on a website or app.
items.example_en: She left a comment on my photo.

items.definition_en: A group chat is a conversation between several people online.
items.example_en: Our family has a group chat for sharing news.

items.definition_en: A phone call is a talk with someone using a phone.
items.example_en: He made a phone call to his mother.

items.definition_en: A text is a written message sent by phone.
items.example_en: I sent her a text this morning.

items.definition_en: A notification tells you when you have a new message or update.
items.example_en: My phone showed a notification from the app.

items.definition_en: A profile is personal information shown on a website or app.
items.example_en: You can see her profile on social media.

items.definition_en: A chat room is a place online where people can talk together.
items.example_en: Many students meet in the chat room after class.

items.definition_en: A video call lets people see and hear each other online.
items.example_en: We had a video call on my birthday.

items.definition_en: A channel is a space online where people share posts or videos.
items.example_en: I follow her channel for cooking tips.

items.definition_en: A username is the name you use to log in online.
items.example_en: Please choose a username for your account.

items.definition_en: A feed is a list of new posts or updates on a website or app.
items.example_en: She checks her feed every morning.

items.definition_en: A share is when you send something online to others.
items.example_en: He got many shares on his photo.

items.definition_en: A tag is a word or name added to link people or topics online.
items.example_en: I saw my tag in her post.

items.definition_en: A like shows that someone enjoyed or supported a post online.
items.example_en: Her picture got many likes.

items.definition_en: A call button is the button you press to start a call.
items.example_en: Press the call button to phone your friend.

items.definition_en: A link is a word or picture you click to go to a website.
items.example_en: Click the link to read the article.

items.definition_en: A friend request asks someone to add you as a contact online.
items.example_en: I accepted her friend request yesterday.

items.definition_en: A story is a short photo or video shared online for a short time.
items.example_en: She posted a story about her holiday.
